name: Control Wires
flavor: Near-invisible monofilament strung from the fingertips — it cuts, it binds, and it answers the puppeteer's will as readily as it answers his hand.

parryProfile.note: The one weapon that can parry ranged attacks as well as melee — a curtain of wire snaps up to turn aside blade or bolt alike. The Puppeteer's only real defense, though his very high Parry DC means even this rarely lands a Full Dodge. Signature to the Puppeteer.
